claim: 24 Trans -2/9 families and 6 controls (3 Log, 3 Alg) processed at dps=[50,100,150,200,250,300] with PSLQ basis {L, sqrt(2,3,5,17), pi, log2, zeta(3), 1}; phantom-hit rule applied (L-coeff=0 rejected).

Trans mean slope -0.999999 (std 4.6e-6, min -1.0, max -0.99998); Log mean -1.0 (std 0); Alg mean -1.0 (std 0); separation gap (min Trans - max Log) = 0.0; slope alone is NOT a reliable Trans-hard discriminator on this 30-family training set.

PSLQ sweep at dps=300 over extended basis {L, L^2, sqrt(17), pi, log2, zeta(3), e, gamma, 1} returns 4 non-phantom L-bearing relations among 24 Trans families: T08_130101, T11_130117, T14_143931, T21_143951.
Closed-form identifications: T08 L = -(pi+2)/2; T11 L = (pi+2)/2; T14 L = -(3*pi+4)/4; T21 L = (3*pi+4)/4. All four are transcendental by Lindemann-Weierstrass and remain in the Trans -2/9 stratum.
